label: Verified historical flood event records
authority: To be identified official or documented authority
target_mapping: Map verified event occurrence to flood_occurred = 1.
notes: Preferred future source type. Not ready until authority, license, location, and date fields are verified.

label: Historical flood extent polygons
authority: To be identified geospatial authority or documented dataset provider
target_mapping: Spatially join observations to flood extent polygons and event dates.
notes: Useful if event dates, polygon quality, CRS, and licensing are verified.

label: Official flood incident reports
authority: To be identified official report publisher
target_mapping: Convert verified incident records to flood occurrence labels by location and date.
notes: Needs structured extraction if the source is not already tabular.

label: Rule-based risk score
target_mapping: Rejected. Must not be mapped to flood_occurred.
notes: Rejected because it would leak the rule-based scoring logic into the target label.
